title: DongleReview
description: Schema for off-chain review comments referenced by CIDs in the Dongle contract

version.description: The schema version of this review document

text.description: The written content/comment of the review

title.description: Optional short summary or title of the review

language.description: The ISO 639-1 language code or BCP 47 tag of the review text

attachments.description: Optional media attachments, screenshots, or proofs supporting the review

cid.description: IPFS content identifier of the attachment file

mime_type.description: MIME media type of the attachment

name.description: Human-readable name or description of the attachment

device_info.description: Optional metadata about the device/client environment used to submit the review
